nasb.text: Seven days you shall celebrate a feast to the Lord your God in the place which the Lord chooses, because the Lord your God will bless you in all your produce and in all the work of your hands, so that you will be altogether joyful.

esv.text: For seven days you shall keep the feast to the Lord your God at the place that the Lord will choose, because the Lord your God will bless you in all your produce and in all the work of your hands, so that you will be altogether joyful.

cnv.text: 你要在耶和華選擇的地方，向耶和華你的　神守節七日，因為耶和華你的　神，要在你一切土產上，和你手所作的一切事上，賜福給你，你就滿有歡樂。

ccb.text: 要在你们的上帝耶和华选定的地方，为祂守住棚节七天；要满心欢喜，因为你们的上帝耶和华赐福你们，使你们的出产丰富、凡事顺利。
